creativeBaseline: The generated Miso Salmon Rice Bowl photograph: realistic food, natural window light, tactile ceramics, restrained stone or linen, generous negative space, and no decorative clutter.
workflow: Dish specification first; photograph generation and visual review second; recipe authoring against the accepted photograph third.

recipes.title: Butter Bean Shakshuka
recipes.culinaryBasis: Shakshuka with eggs poached in a pepper and tomato sauce
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down view of a small iron skillet on warm stone; glossy sauce and softly set yolks.

recipes.title: Harissa Salmon with Herb Couscous
recipes.culinaryBasis: Harissa-glazed roast salmon with lemony couscous
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down shallow ceramic plate, salmon off-centre over a broad bed of jewelled herb couscous.

recipes.title: Halloumi, Lentil & Roast Veg Salad
recipes.culinaryBasis: Warm lentil salad with grilled halloumi and roasted vegetables
recipes.photoComposition: Wide shallow platter photographed overhead; ingredients remain distinct and abundant rather than finely mixed.

recipes.title: Tomato Butter Bean Orzo
recipes.culinaryBasis: One-pan tomato orzo with creamy white beans
recipes.photoComposition: Close three-quarter overhead in a low cream bowl with visible beans and orzo texture; no cheese garnish.

recipes.title: Prawn Saganaki with Feta
recipes.culinaryBasis: Greek prawn saganaki baked in tomato sauce with feta
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down terracotta baking dish with six to eight prawns clearly visible and bread on a folded linen beside it.

recipes.title: Green Herb Falafel Bowl
recipes.culinaryBasis: Chickpea falafel with tabbouleh-style grains and tahini
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down divided bowl with falafel as the hero and fresh components arranged naturally, not symmetrically.

recipes.title: Miso Salmon Rice Bowl
recipes.culinaryBasis: Miso-glazed salmon with rice and crisp vegetables
recipes.photoComposition: Accepted creative baseline image: top-down handmade ceramic bowl on warm stone with restrained linen and sauce dish.

recipes.title: Gochujang Turkey Meatballs with Sesame Rice
recipes.culinaryBasis: Turkey meatballs glazed with gochujang, soy and honey
recipes.photoComposition: Three-quarter overhead stoneware bowl; meatballs grouped loosely over rice with sauce visibly clinging.

recipes.title: Ginger Chicken Udon
recipes.culinaryBasis: Stir-fried udon with ginger, soy, chicken and greens
recipes.photoComposition: Close three-quarter view in a dark shallow bowl; glossy noodles remain separate rather than soupy.

recipes.title: Crispy Tofu Peanut Noodles
recipes.culinaryBasis: Rice noodles in peanut-lime sauce with crisp tofu
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down low bowl with tofu piled over sauced noodles and fresh vegetables kept crisp and visible.

recipes.title: Thai Basil Beef with Rice
recipes.culinaryBasis: Pad kra pao-style minced beef with basil, chilli and fried egg
recipes.photoComposition: Three-quarter overhead plate; rice mound, beef and egg are clearly separated with the yolk intact.

recipes.title: Sesame Soba & Edamame Salad
recipes.culinaryBasis: Cold soba noodle salad with sesame-soy dressing
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down broad bowl; naturally tangled noodles with bright vegetables distributed throughout.

recipes.title: Coconut Lime Chicken Curry
recipes.culinaryBasis: Thai-inspired coconut chicken curry with lime and green vegetables
recipes.photoComposition: Three-quarter overhead with curry in a rounded bowl and rice in a separate low bowl; realistic sauce consistency.

recipes.title: Soy Ginger Cod with Bok Choy
recipes.culinaryBasis: Steam-roasted cod with soy, ginger and greens
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down oval plate with cod centred over rice and bok choy alongside; no raw ginger pile.

recipes.title: Kimchi Fried Rice with Eggs
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down dark skillet with crisp-edged eggs resting over orange-red rice; natural steam but no haze.

recipes.title: Mango Prawn Rice Bowl
recipes.culinaryBasis: Chilli-lime prawns with mango, rice and crunchy vegetables
recipes.photoComposition: Bright top-down bowl with ingredients in relaxed sections and prawns placed across the centre.

recipes.title: Huevos Rancheros with Black Beans
recipes.culinaryBasis: Fried eggs, tomato-chilli salsa and black beans over corn tortillas
recipes.photoComposition: Three-quarter overhead ceramic plate with tortilla edges visible and yolks intact; components not buried.

recipes.title: Chicken Tinga Rice Bowl
recipes.photoComposition: Top-down earthenware bowl with juicy chicken as the hero and modest fresh toppings.

selectionStatus: 18 founder-approved photographs; rejected and unreviewed concepts excluded
